overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European town at dusk. The character moves through narrow cobblestone streets lined with stone and timber-framed buildings, transitioning from enclosed alleys to an open harbor area with large ship sails visible, then continuing through a market district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with stone tenements

events.description: approaching and passing through stone archway gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone street, passing townsfolk

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking ahead of Geralt toward the archway

entered.detail: tall medieval stone buildings with small windows and wooden shutters
stone tenement buildings with arched doorways
large stone archway with metal portcullis leading to inner town
irregular cobblestone paving with grass growing between stones

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval street flanked by tall stone buildings. The warm dusk light casts long shadows on the cobblestones as he approaches a stone archway. A woman in a red dress walks ahead of him toward the gate.

events.description: entering covered area beneath wooden scaffolding and beams
emerging from shadow back into dusk light as street opens ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the wooden structure, navigating the narrow passage

notable_agents.action: townsman leaning against wall near stone stairs

entered.detail: rough timber beams and planks forming a covered bridge or construction scaffolding overhead
stone steps leading up to building entrance on the right
triangular pennant banners strung across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The street narrows further beneath a heavy wooden scaffolding structure that blocks most of the sky. Geralt passes under the timber beams as the lighting dims, then begins to emerge back into the warm dusk light. Stone stairs lead up to a doorway on the right where a townsman stands.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor market street with ship masts visible

events.description: street opens to reveal large ship sails and harbor in the distance
passing market stalls with goods displayed on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area, observing the harbor view and stalls

notable_agents.action: merchant standing behind wooden stall with red awning

entered.detail: tall white sails of ships in the harbor visible between buildings
wooden market stall with red fabric canopy selling goods
tall timber-framed tower with pointed roof at the end of the street
multiple wooden vendor stalls with barrels and pottery

segments.scene_description: The street widens into a market area with the harbor visible ahead, large ship sails rising against the orange dusk sky. Geralt passes wooden market stalls on the right displaying goods under red awnings. The architecture shifts to more timber-framed buildings as the cobblestone street shows patches of grass along the edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: town center with timber buildings and well

agents.ego_description: continuing through the town center, passing close to other townsfolk

notable_agents.action: bearded man in pink tunic walking past Geralt in opposite direction

entered.detail: half-timbered medieval houses with white plaster and dark wooden beams
timber-framed buildings with overhanging upper floors
circular stone well with wooden cover on the right side of street
wooden hand cart with logs parked on the left

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the town center where timber-framed buildings line both sides of the street. He passes a stone well and wooden cart, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. The warm dusk light continues to bathe the scene as he moves deeper into the residential district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town that transitions from narrow, shadowed alleys into an open harbor district and residential center at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone street flanked by tall stone buildings, following a woman in a red dress toward a stone archway. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens beneath heavy wooden scaffolding that dims the light before emerging again past stone stairs and a waiting townsman. The scene then opens into a wide market area where the orange sky reveals large ship sails in the distance and red-awned stalls line the path. Finally, the camera glides through the town center past a stone well and wooden cart, moving deeper into a residential district of timber-framed buildings bathed in warm evening light.
